transcript: Speaker A: If you're over 50 and think you'll never speak English - you're wrong! You just need to practice everyday, and that's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person. I'll chat with you, provide instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you improve with every conversation. It's fast, easy, and pressure-free. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Let's practice together every day, and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
on_screen_text: If you're over 50 and think you'll never speak English - you're wrong! You just need to practice everyday, and that's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. With me, you can practice anytime, anywhere, just like you would with a real person. I'll chat with you, provide instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you improve with every conversation. It's fast, easy, and pressure-free. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Let's practice together every day, and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
summary: An AI avatar named Loora introduces herself as an English tutor targeting learners over 50. She promises pressure-free daily practice with instant pronunciation feedback to help users improve quickly.
